mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.user_id userId, u.username, u.avatar userAvatar, r.rating, r.content, r.order_type orderType, r.create_time createTime FROM t_review r LEFT JOIN t_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.doctor_id = #{doctorId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.order_type AS orderType, CASE WHEN r.order_type = 1 THEN '挂号评价' WHEN r.order_type = 2 THEN '电话咨询评价' ELSE '评价' END AS orderTypeName, r.order_id AS orderId, r.user_id AS userId, u.username AS userName, u.avatar AS userAvatar, r.doctor_id AS doctorId, d.name AS doctorName, d.title AS doctorTitle, d.avatar AS doctorAvatar, dt.name AS departmentName, h.name AS hospitalName, r.rating, r.content, r.create_time AS createTime FROM t_review r LEFT JOIN t_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_doctor d ON r.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN t_department dt ON d.department_id = dt.id LEFT JOIN t_hospital h ON d.hospital_id = h.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
